infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Alenio uses the camera to take photos and join video calls with your team.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Alenio uses the microphone for video calls and voice messages in team chats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Alenio accesses your photos to share images in team and direct message chats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Alenio saves shared media to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: Alenio accesses your photos to share images in chats.
